title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: NARA NW WELLNESS CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general medical care, immunizations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, diabetes testing, sexually transmitted infections testing and treatment, breast cancer screening, tobacco cessation programs, addictions assessment and treatment, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) eligibility assistance. 12360 E Burnside Street 2nd Floor Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Native American or Alaskan Native or other vulnerable populations Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Email (971) 279-4800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 279-4800 FAX (971) 279-2213 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale fees available DOCUMENTS: Native American ID card, photo ID, birth certificate if direct descendent of enrolled Native American LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Tuesday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Native American Community Childhood Immunization * Native American Community Colorectal Cancer Detection * Native American Community Community Clinics * Native American Community Diabetes Screening * Native American Community Individual Counseling * Native American Community Mammograms * Native American Community Mental Health Evaluation * Native American Community Navigator Programs * Native American Community Vaccine Information * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NARA NW WELLNESS CENTER
